category_title: Young child with severe autism exhibiting physical aggression to escape demands or gain attention
minimal_context: Lauren is sitting next to her teacher in the classroom during snack time to eat her preferred food.
dialogue:
TUTOR: It is time for snack.

STUDENT: Snack.

TUTOR: You can have this in a minute. (Places the preferred food item in sight but out of reach)

STUDENT: Eat!

TUTOR: We just need to wait.

STUDENT: (Screams loudly, pushes the table, and starts kicking and grabbing the teacher)

options.A: Ask the student if things were tough at home last night and proceed more carefully today.
options.B: Use a request for clarification, asking the student for explanations and elaborations about her behavior.
options.C: Provide the student with immediate access to the preferred food item for 60 seconds.
options.D: Instruct the student to pause, consider consequences before acting, and seek adult help instead of acting aggressively.
